title: BreakingBosses
description: Adds Breaking Bad characters as bosses!
body:
Introduction:

In this mod I plan to add as many Breaking Bad and Better Call Saul characters as bosses as I can. I might add a few guest characters though, I have a few planned.

This mod adds more comical, funnier bosses.

This mod requires GECKOLIB:
https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib

Bosses (So far)

There is only one mob as for now.

Walter White, AKA Heisenberg.

Heisenberg will throw crystals (with a little tweak of chemistry) at you, they will explode if they do not hit you, but will set you on fire if they do. They do a lot of knockback.

He has 100 hearts in total: He drops an item, which is his recipe book. You can use it to shoot crystals at your enemies.

Walt is spawned by crafting 2 crystal brick blocks, placing them, and placing a jack o lantern on top of them.

The recipe for crystal bricks can be seen here:
https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/742bd166b639b7e1f3bb42b13e7dd2f33b35f94f.png
